gist.headline: Fresh pixels in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Someone built a slick Next.js image editor powered by our API, so we put it in the greenhouse. Go make some pixels.
gist.summary: Added the image-gen-editor app to the community showcase, featuring a Next.js 14 web interface for generating and editing images via the Pollinations API.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use a new community-built web interface for creating and tweaking AI images.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds an image generation and editing app to the community greenhouse. Visuals should feature Polly the bee as an artist in a greenhouse setting, interacting with a digital canvas or editing interface.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting on a glowing digital canvas inside a lush greenhouse filled with code-plants. A chunky Monitor Robot stands nearby holding a palette of soft pastel colors. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
